positive: A stylized, geometric celestial map featuring crescent moons, stylized constellations, and flowing nebula clouds rendered in a vintage tarot card aesthetic. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, dominated by deep sapphire blue and cosmic gold accents, contrasted with soft mint green highlights. Elements must be clean, crisp silhouettes with thick outlines, suitable for direct apparel printing. Include motifs like minimalist celestial geometry, stylized rings, and abstract star bursts, giving it a mystical yet modern, ethereal feel. High contrast, detailed vector illustration style.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, logo, copyright, blurry background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, cluttered, gradients (excessive), messy, photo, realistic photography
